positive: A whimsical, highly stylized graphic illustration featuring a group of abstract celestial elements – crescent moons, shooting stars, nebulous swirls, and constellations – arranged in a cohesive, circular mandala pattern. The style should evoke vintage occult engravings mixed with modern cosmic abstract art. Use deep midnight blues, ethereal purples, burnt oranges, and pops of iridescent gold for color. The composition must be centered and scalable, with clean, solid silhouettes suitable for printing on apparel. High contrast is key, ensuring the elements pop against a single background color. Minimal shading, maximum decorative impact. Vector graphic quality, intricate detail.
negative: blur, text, signature, watermark, logo, artifact, smudge, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, low quality, jpeg artifacts, messy, grainy, cartoon, photorealistic, 3d render
